stmt: UPDATE {schema}.{table} SET status = $1, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $2
UPDATE {schema}.{table} SET last_login = now() WHERE id = $1
UPDATE {schema}.{table} SET quantity = quantity - $1 WHERE product_id = $2 AND warehouse_id = $3
UPDATE {schema}.{table} SET password_hash = $1, updated_at = now() WHERE user_id = $2
UPDATE {schema}.{table} SET read = $1 WHERE user_id = $2 AND created_at < $3
